name: id_tabela
description: Table slug the coded column belongs to (e.g. round_08).

name: nome_coluna
description: Name of the coded column the mapping applies to.

name: chave
description: Code (key) as stored in the data table.

name: cobertura_temporal
description: Temporal coverage (round/year range) the mapping applies to.

name: valor
description: Human-readable label corresponding to the code.
